input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: v.1.2
            TITLE: wheelbase

            CONTENT:
            rule V.1.2: Wheelbase
V.1.2 Wheelbase 
The vehicle must have a minimum wheelbase of 1525 mm

final_answer: rule V.1.2: Wheelbase V.1.2 Wheelbase The vehicle must have a minimum wheelbase of 1525 mm
